description: Per-pool capacity, IOPS, throughput, and object count metrics via Thanos Querier
technicalNotes: Discovers pools from ceph_pool_metadata, filters by pool_id. ceph_pool_percent_used is 0-1 range, multiplied by 100 for display. IOPS and throughput use rate() over 5m window.
name: ODF_Ceph_Pool_Performance
